title: Vases of Echo
description: A Mod that adds Vases that contain Loot to Ancient Cities. Inspired by the Vases from CSMP.
body:
![Vases of Echo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/601e698984d83ef2be91594702aeeedcb635b0a4.png) #

A mod that adds vases containing loot to Ancient Cities.

# # Features - Ancient Cities now contain vases filled with loot. Break the vases to collect the loot, but be careful! Breaking them is very loud and it will alert Sculk Sensors. - Vases can also be broken with Silk Touch if you want to use them as decoration. - Vases come in three different sizes: Big, Small, and Tall; all containing the same amount of loot. # Known Issues - This mod will break when used with anything else that modifies Ancient City generation. # Credits - **This mod was inspired by the vases from ContentSMP.**
